title: Ellen Spertus Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Ellen Spertus Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Ellen Spertus
Khoury Faculty
MS in Computer Science, Massachusetts Institute of Technology
Oakland Campus
Ellen Spertus’s programming journey began in her childhood, and led her to a 10-year career as a research scientist at Google. While teaching at Khoury College’s Oakland campus, she encourages students to believe in their own potential for success, too.
I like to bring my industry experience and my many decades of computer experience to the classroom, talking with students about what’s done in industry and why we teach what we do
Ellen Spertus, Teaching Professor
Explore all Khoury stories
